name: HWR_SRVY_TOPIC_PER_OWNR
description: This will store information regarding the topics associated with the Line Manager // owner of topics. Table specific for meeting survey.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Topic ID identifying the Topic entry in this table.

columns.Name: TOPIC_OWNER
columns.Comments: This is the FUSION id of the owner of this Topic.

columns.Name: QUESTIONAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID for which Topic is being added.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey

columns.Name: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: TOPICS_PER_OWNER_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
